# /create-pr

## Purpose
Open or update a PR after scope lock and review evidence are current.

## When To Use
When the branch is ready to publish for CI and external review.

## Required Contracts
- `scope-lock` - Scope identity (issue/branch/pr head/range) must match before high-impact operations
- `pr-open-preconditions` - PR creation requires required evidence and scope lock validation
- `review-evidence-link` - Review evidence links to current commit/range
